HGSS.092.0000:
Jasmine: ...This Pokémon always kept
the sea lit at night.\f
...But it suddenly got sick...
It’s gasping for air...\f
...I understand that there is a
wonderful Pharmacy in Cianwood...\f
But that’s across the sea...
And I can’t leave Amphy unattended...\f
HGSS.092.0001:
...May I ask you to get some medicine
for me? Please?\f
HGSS.092.0004:
Jasmine: ...Um, please don’t be
offended...\f
Amphy will not take anything from
anyone but me...\f
HGSS.092.0005:
Jasmine: ...\f
Amphy, how are you feeling?\f
HGSS.092.0007:
Jasmine: ...Oh, I’m so relieved...
This is just so wonderful...\f
Thank you so very, very much.
...I will return to the Gym...\f
